slides.title: Study Motivation
content: The project compares a baseline model with an updated feature set on a deidentified cohort.

slides.title: Method
content: - Inputs were preprocessed with a fixed pipeline.
- Evaluation uses held-out folds and source-tracked metrics.

slides.title: Results
content: The updated feature set improves calibration while leaving discrimination similar.

slides.title: Discussion
content: The next decision is whether the calibration gain is sufficient for deployment review.
